chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Bail Appln. No.S — 708 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.07.2022. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 6090/2022. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 6091/2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Sajid Ali Gorar Advocate along with the applicant. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4. The Applicant/accused Iftikhar Hussain seeks protective bail in crime No.585 of 2022, registered at Police Station Race Course District Rawalpindi Punjab, under section 489-F PPC. It is inter-alia contended that applicant/accused is prepared to surrender before Sessions Court Rawalpindi Pinjab, but he apprehends his imminent arrest before reaching the said Court, as such, he seeks protective bail to enable him to appear before the learned trial court for seeking pre-arrest bail. Serious malafides on the part of the complainant and the police have been alleged. Without touching merits of the case, in order to enable the Applicant to appear and surrender before the trial Court, the Applicant is admitted to protective bail for fifteen days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-(Fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like sum to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The applicant is directed to join the investigation. In case the Applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court within the time specified, surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. This protective bail shall remain effective up to 18.07.2022 or when the applicant surrender before the trial Court whichever is the earlier.

In case the Applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court within the time specified, surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. This protective bail shall remain effective up to 18.07.2022 or when the applicant surrender before the trial Court whichever is the earlier. This criminal bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE A.
